author: Niche Gamer
text:
Persona 4 Revival announces English voice cast After rumors were swirling, Atlus has announced the English voice cast for Persona 4 Revival, their new remake of their beloved RPG classic Persona 4. While the English voice cast for Persona 4 Revival is entirely new, the Japanese voice cast has remained the same since the original release. Here’s the cast: Protagonist (voice by Nazeeh Tarsha) – A […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Dungeon Settlers Preview Steam Next Fest always seems to have that one surprise game you stumble upon by accident and end up enjoying far more than expected. For me, that game was Dungeon Settlers, a dark fantasy strategy title that combines colony management, dungeon crawling, and RPG progression into a surprisingly addictive package. At first glance, Dungeon Settlers […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Xbox might introduce Buy Now, Pay Later options for games and console A new discovery hidden within Xbox’s website code suggests Microsoft may be preparing to offer Buy Now, Pay Later options directly through its storefront. According to dataminers, references to services such as Klarna and PayPal Pay in 4 have appeared in the backend of the Xbox website. If implemented, you could potentially split purchases into […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Outward 2 delayed to 2027 Not long after launching an open beta for Outward 2, developer Nine Dots Studio has announced they’re delaying the game. Their hotly-anticipated open-world survival action RPG sequel will forgo its July 7th early access release for one sometime in 2027 with specific timing to be announced in the near future. When Outward 2 does launch, it’ll be […]

Source

author: Niche Gamer
text:
SPRAWL Zero Preview I believe it was Franz Kafka and Junji Ito who most effectively illustrated the concept of “trap designed specifically for you”. A process, labyrinth or a hole. Anything can suck a man in and not let go. SPRAWL Zero is a honeypot made for yours truly. Inspired by shooters and aesthetics of the early 2000’s, […]

text:
Xbox Game Pass lineup for late June 2026 announced Microsoft has announced the next lineup of games coming to Xbox Game Pass, free games for subscribers of the platform for late June 2026. Here’s a rundown on the new Xbox Game Pass lineup: Available Today Junkster (Cloud, XBOX Series X|S, Handheld, and PC) – June 16 Game Pass Ultimate, PC Game Pass Available day one on XBOX Game […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Edge of Memories Preview Edge of Memories was one of the games I was looking forward to during Steam Next Fest. The trailers, screenshots, and overall marketing suggested a visually impressive action RPG with an interesting world and a unique premise. Unfortunately, after spending several hours with the demo, I came away disappointed. The game shown in the promotional […]

author: Niche Gamer
text:
Clive Barker’s Hellraiser: Revival gets release date and twisted new trailer Saber Interactive and Boss Team Games announced a release date for Clive Barker’s Hellraiser: Revival. Clive Barker’s Hellraiser: Revival is set to launch across Windows PC (via Steam), PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X/S on October 8th, just in time for Halloween. Here’s a rundown on the previously announced game, plus a new trailer: Embark on a battle for […]

text:
Captain Tsubasa 2: World Fighters gets new overview trailer Publisher Bandai Namco and developer Tamsoft shared a new overview trailer for Captain Tsubasa 2: World Fighters, their new soccer game sequel. text:
Quiet Express Cabin 909 launches in 2027 Developer Kazuhide Oka and co-developer/publisher STUDIO 909 announced a release window for Quiet Express Cabin 909, their fantasy anime adventure game. Quiet Express Cabin 909 is in development for Windows PC (Steam) with a release now set for sometime in 2027.
